texto: You do build in darkness if you have faith. When the light returns you have made of yourself a fortress which is impregnable to certain kinds of trouble you may even find yourself needed and sought by others as a beacon in their dark.
explicacao: Citação de Olga Rosmanith sobre temas ligados a fe. “You do build in darkness if you have faith. When the light returns you have made of yourself a fo…” articula fe, faith, unity em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e unity.
